name: Rams @Elec — Job Assignment Notifications
description: Triggered when a technician is assigned to a job. Sends WhatsApp notifications to both technician and customer.

parameters.query: SELECT j.id, j.scheduled_date, j.area_zone, j.urgency, st.name as service_name, c.name as customer_name, c.phone as customer_phone, t.name as tech_name, t.phone as tech_phone FROM jobs j JOIN service_types st ON j.service_type_id = st.id JOIN customers c ON j.customer_id = c.id JOIN technicians t ON j.technician_id = t.id WHERE j.id = '{{ $json.job_id }}'

INSERT INTO notification_log (customer_id, channel, message_type, content, status) SELECT customer_id, 'whatsapp', 'job_update', 'Job {{ $json.id }} assigned to {{ $json.tech_name }}', 'sent' FROM jobs WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'
